---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report a problem in the documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
---

<!--
Documentation issue template.
Before submitting, check:
- docs/RESUMPTION.md for the canonical current-state document
- docs/CONTRIBUTING.md → "Rules for documentation changes" for
  the discipline applied to doc work
-->

## Affected document

<!-- Path to the doc with the issue. Examples:
     - docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
     - docs/domain/execution.md
     - docs/decisions/0010-httprouter-trie-constraints.md
-->

## Problem type

<!-- Pick one:
     - [ ] Factual error (doc disagrees with code)
     - [ ] Outdated content (doc reflects pre-reset or pre-feature state)
     - [ ] Missing content (something should be documented but isn't)
     - [ ] Unclear wording (technically correct but hard to understand)
     - [ ] Broken cross-reference (link to nonexistent doc/section)
-->

## Description

<!-- What is wrong? Be specific — quote the problematic section if
     short, or give line numbers. -->

## Expected content

<!-- What should the doc say instead? -->

## Discovery context

<!-- How did you discover this? (Reading? Trying to follow steps?
     Code disagreed with doc?) -->

## Severity

<!-- - High: misleads contributors into incorrect changes
     - Medium: requires extra investigation to clarify
     - Low: wording polish or minor improvement
-->

Medium
